questions.text_en: Is this your first year at this school?
questions.text_es: ¿Es este tu primer año en esta escuela?

questions.text_en: How old are you?
questions.text_es: ¿Cuántos años tienes?

questions.text_en: What gender do you identify with?
questions.text_es: ¿Con qué género te identificas?

questions.text_en: Does anyone in your home speak a language other than English? (e.g. Spanish, Russian, Somali, Cherokee, Navajo, or another language)
questions.text_es: ¿En tu hogar se habla alguna lengua distinta al inglés? (por ejemplo: español, ruso, somalí, Cherokee, Navajo u otra)

questions.text_en: How long have you been at this school?
questions.text_es: ¿Cuánto tiempo llevas en esta escuela?

questions.text_en: My teacher enforces the classroom rules in a fair and consistent way.
questions.text_es: Mi profesor/a hace cumplir las normas de convivencia de manera justa y consistente.

questions.text_en: When there is a problem between students, my teacher listens to everyone involved.
questions.text_es: Cuando hay un problema entre estudiantes, mi profesor/a escucha a todos los involucrados.

questions.text_en: When someone is humiliated or excluded in front of others, my teacher intervenes immediately.
questions.text_es: Cuando alguien es humillado o excluido frente a otros, mi profesor/a interviene de inmediato.

questions.text_en: When my teacher intervenes in a problem between students, they follow up to make sure it was resolved.
questions.text_es: Cuando mi profesor/a interviene en un problema entre estudiantes, hace seguimiento para asegurarse de que se resolvió.

questions.text_en: If I report a bullying problem to my teacher (including online), they take action.
questions.text_es: Si le reporto a mi profesor/a un problema de bullying (incluyendo en línea), toma acción.

questions.text_en: When there is a digital bullying problem, my teacher coordinates with other adults at school to address it.
questions.text_es: Cuando hay un problema de bullying digital, mi profesor/a coordina con otros adultos de la escuela para atenderlo.

questions.text_en: My teacher shows they care about how I feel at school.
questions.text_es: Mi profesor/a me demuestra que le importa cómo me siento en la escuela.

questions.text_en: In my class, if someone humiliates or excludes a classmate, others tell them to stop.
questions.text_es: En mi curso, si alguien humilla o excluye a un compañero, los demás le dicen que pare.

questions.text_en: I have seen classmates defend someone who was being bullied.
questions.text_es: He visto a compañeros defender a alguien que estaba siendo molestado.

questions.text_en: If I defend someone who is being bullied, other classmates support me.
questions.text_es: Si yo defiendo a alguien que está siendo molestado, otros compañeros me apoyan.

questions.text_en: I have stepped in to help someone who was being bullied.
questions.text_es: Yo he intervenido para ayudar a alguien que estaba siendo molestado.

questions.text_en: In my class, kind and supportive students are respected more than those who bully.
questions.text_es: En mi curso, se respeta más a los compañeros solidarios que a los que intimidan.

questions.text_en: When I see a classmate being attacked or humiliated online, I do something to help.
questions.text_es: Cuando veo que un compañero es atacado o humillado en redes sociales, hago algo para ayudar.

questions.text_en: When students report bullying to an adult at school, the situation is taken seriously and addressed.
questions.text_es: Cuando los estudiantes reportan bullying a un adulto de la escuela, la situación se toma en serio y se atiende.

questions.text_en: When bullying is reported, adults follow up to make sure the problem is resolved.
questions.text_es: Cuando se reporta bullying, los adultos hacen seguimiento de que el problema se resuelva.

questions.text_en: My school has a counselor or trusted adult I can talk to about problems.
questions.text_es: En mi escuela hay una persona encargada de orientación o consejería a quien puedo acudir.

questions.text_en: When I have a problem, I can easily find an adult at school who is willing to listen.
questions.text_es: Cuando tengo un problema, encuentro fácilmente a un adulto que me escucha en la escuela.

questions.text_en: I feel safe reporting bullying without fear of retaliation.
questions.text_es: Me siento seguro/a de que, si reporto bullying, no me van a hacer daño en represalia.

questions.text_en: When bullying occurs, adults at my school follow clear steps to address it.
questions.text_es: Cuando ocurre un caso de acoso escolar, los adultos siguen un protocolo claro.

questions.text_en: I have seen adults specifically supervising how older students treat younger ones.
questions.text_es: He visto que hay adultos supervisando específicamente cómo se relacionan los estudiantes mayores con los menores.

questions.text_en: I have seen adults intervene when an older student bothers a younger one.
questions.text_es: He visto que cuando un estudiante mayor molesta a uno menor, un adulto interviene.

questions.text_en: I have seen teachers enforce that older students treat younger ones with respect.
questions.text_es: He visto que los profesores hacen cumplir que los mayores traten bien a los menores.

questions.text_en: I have seen younger students being bullied by older students.
questions.text_es: He visto que estudiantes menores son molestados por estudiantes mayores.

questions.text_en: I have seen older students force younger ones to do things for them.
questions.text_es: He visto que obligan a estudiantes menores a hacer favores o cosas que no quieren.

questions.text_en: In the playground or during recess, there are adults making sure no one is being bullied.
questions.text_es: En el patio o recreo, hay adultos supervisando que nadie moleste a nadie.

questions.text_en: In the school bathrooms and hallways, I feel safe and comfortable.
questions.text_es: En los baños y pasillos de la escuela, me siento tranquilo/a y sin miedo.

questions.text_en: In hallways and stairwells, there are adults supervising during passing periods.
questions.text_es: En pasillos y escaleras, hay adultos supervisando durante los cambios de clase.

questions.text_en: At the school entrance and exit, there is staff making sure everyone is safe.
questions.text_es: En la entrada y salida de la escuela, hay personal supervisando que todos estén seguros.

questions.text_en: In the cafeteria, there are adults supervising and ensuring a respectful environment.
questions.text_es: En la cafetería, hay adultos supervisando y asegurando un ambiente de respeto.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group has hit, pushed, or physically hurt me REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero o grupo me ha golpeado, empujado o lastimado físicamente de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group has threatened or intimidated me REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero o grupo me ha amenazado o intimidado de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group has said hurtful or insulting things to me REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero o grupo me ha dicho cosas hirientes o insultantes de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group has spread false rumors about me REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero o grupo ha difundido rumores falsos sobre mí de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: THE SAME group has deliberately left me out of activities or conversations REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO grupo me ha dejado fuera de actividades o conversaciones a propósito de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group has forced me to do things against my will REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero o grupo me ha obligado a hacer cosas contra mi voluntad de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group has bullied me REPEATEDLY because of my appearance, origin, race, or identity.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero o grupo me ha molestado de manera REPETIDA por mi apariencia, origen, raza o identidad.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group has made sexual comments, touched me, or sent me sexual content without my consent REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero/a o grupo me ha hecho comentarios, tocado o enviado contenido sexual sin mi consentimiento de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: I have hit, pushed, or physically hurt classmates REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: He golpeado, empujado o lastimado físicamente a compañeros de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: I have threatened classmates with hurting them if they don't do what I want.
questions.text_es: He amenazado a compañeros con hacerles daño si no hacen lo que quiero.

questions.text_en: I have said things to humiliate classmates in front of others REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: He dicho cosas para humillar a compañeros frente a otros de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: I have spread false rumors about classmates REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: He difundido rumores falsos sobre compañeros de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: I have REPEATEDLY kept certain classmates from joining our group or activities.
questions.text_es: He evitado de manera REPETIDA que ciertos compañeros se unan a nuestro grupo o actividades.

questions.text_en: I have forced classmates to do things against their will REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: He obligado a compañeros a hacer cosas contra su voluntad de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: I have REPEATEDLY bullied classmates because of their appearance, origin, race, or identity.
questions.text_es: He molestado de manera REPETIDA a compañeros por su apariencia, origen, raza o identidad.

questions.text_en: THE SAME classmate or group from my school has sent me hurtful messages or shared my secrets online REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: UN MISMO compañero o grupo de mi escuela me ha enviado mensajes hirientes o compartido mis secretos en línea de manera REPETIDA.

questions.text_en: I have received hurtful messages from fake or anonymous profiles.
questions.text_es: He recibido mensajes hirientes de perfiles falsos o anónimos.

questions.text_en: Photos, videos, or content of me have been posted or shared online to humiliate me.
questions.text_es: Han publicado o compartido fotos, videos o contenido en línea para humillarme.

questions.text_en: I have been threatened online with having my private information spread.
questions.text_es: Me han amenazado en línea con difundir información privada mía.

questions.text_en: Problems with classmates continue or get worse online even after school hours.
questions.text_es: Los problemas con compañeros de la escuela continúan o empeoran en línea fuera del horario escolar.

questions.text_en: Many people have been organized REPEATEDLY to send me hurtful messages or mock me online at the same time.
questions.text_es: Han organizado de manera REPETIDA que muchas personas al mismo tiempo me envíen mensajes hirientes o se burlen de mí en línea.

questions.text_en: I have sent hurtful messages or comments to a classmate online REPEATEDLY.
questions.text_es: He enviado mensajes o comentarios hirientes de manera REPETIDA a un compañero en línea.

questions.text_en: I have REPEATEDLY kept THE SAME classmate out of online groups or chats on purpose.
questions.text_es: He evitado de manera REPETIDA que UN MISMO compañero se una a grupos o chats en línea.

questions.text_en: I have created memes, edited photos, or used fake profiles to mock or humiliate a classmate.
questions.text_es: He creado memes, editado fotos o usado perfiles falsos para burlarme o humillar a un compañero.
